forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula during the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 18.
Moderate

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm in the south. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning and early afternoon then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then turning south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwesterly 35 to 50 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 19.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 25 to 35 km/h turning southwesterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning south to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h turning northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
No Rating

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely from late this morning. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds north to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 18.
Moderate

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the late morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning west to southwesterly 30 to 45 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the morning. Winds southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds north to northwesterly and light becoming northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning then turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 20.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h turning westerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the southwest, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm near the eastern border in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h turning westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending west to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the west, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 15 and 20.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers in the west, high chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h turning westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h tending southwesterly during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending southwesterly during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures between 16 and 20.
No Rating

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers near the coast, slight chance elsewhere. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending west to southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers near the coast, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the afternoon then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Hawker, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely this afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming westerly 25 to 40 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures around 19.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers south of Streaky Bay, medium chance elsewhere. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h turning southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. The chance of morning fog west of Nullarbor. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog east of Ceduna. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the south, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending west to northwesterly 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 21.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending west to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower near the coast in the morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm near the east coast this morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning westerly 30 to 45 km/h in the late morning then decreasing to 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Daytime maximum temperatures between 17 and 20.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h turning southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming northwest to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending south to southwesterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 21.

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera, most likely during this afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm north of Marla early this morning. Winds west to southwesterly 25 to 35 km/h. Daytime maximum temperatures in the low 20s.
Moderate

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Woomera in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 30 km/h before tending south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning and afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the far west. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers north of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm this morning. Winds south to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon. Daytime maximum temperatures between 19 and 23.
Moderate

Mostly sunny. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta in the late morning and afternoon. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming light in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 23.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Yunta, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Light winds becoming southerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 23.
